                        Affairs (Powell) to President
                            Reagan

matches.sentence: Washington , March 21, 1988 Secretary Shultz ’s Overview of Impending Shevardnadze Visit Secretary Shultz has sent you a memo outlining his expectations and plans for the next ministerial with Shevardnadze (Tab A).

Washington , March 21, 1988 Secretary Shultz ’s Overview of Impending Shevardnadze Visit Secretary Shultz has sent you a memo outlining his expectations and plans for the next ministerial with Shevardnadze (Tab A).
Gorbachev ’s response to your private message on START suggests he shares your view that our objective should be a good treaty—a view you can underscore to Shevardnadze .

Dick Murphy will have personally briefed Shevardnadze on my Middle East trip, and, in the wake of Shamir’s visit, I will outline our views of how, precisely, Moscow could make a positive contribution to bringing peace to the region.
Charlie Wick has asked that you and I make a strong pitch for agreement in principle on the establishment of cultural centers in Washington and Moscow.

Senator Baker spoke for some degree of linkage, saying that the political situation is very different from 1980: The Soviets do want out of Afghanistan; they also want an arms control agreement; and the President is politically stronger than was Jimmy Carter .
